revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{GeoGroup|level=0}} This category includes historical {{{4|battles}}} in which {{{1|COUNTRY}}} ({{{2|CREATED}}}–{{{3|DESTROYED}}}) participated. Please see the [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Military history#{{{5|Battles}}}|category guidelines]] for more information.<noinclude> [[Category:Category namespace templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Battle_category_by_participant here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Battle_category_by_participant for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{GeoGroup|level=0}} This category includes historical {{{4|battles}}} in which {{{1|COUNTRY}}} ({{{2|CREATED}}}–{{{3|DESTROYED}}}) participated. Please see the [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Military history#{{{5|Battles}}}|category guidelines]] for more information.<noinclude> [[Category:Category namespace templates]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
